title: PDGC-2026
content: PDGC-2026 main 2026 Ninth International Conference on Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing (PDGC-2026) 19-21 November, 2026 Department of Computer Science & Engineering and Information Technology Jaypee University of Information Technology ............... ............... PDGC Home PDGC-2026 Home Committees Technical Program Committee Important Dates Call for Papers Special Sessions Paper Submission Camera Ready Submission Programs Schedule Keynote Speakers Registration Downloads Sponsorship Opportunities Contact Registration Fee Participant Type IEEE Members (Indian) Non-IEEE Members (Indian) IEEE Members (International) Non-IEEE Members (International) Student Authors (UG/PG/Research Scholars) ₹7,500 ₹9,000 $200 $240 Academicians (Faculty) ₹8,500 ₹10,200 $300 $360 Industry/ Corporate Professionals ₹10,000 ₹12,000 $400 $480 Attendees/Co-authors ₹3,000 ₹3,600 $100 $120 ** IEEE members need to submit a copy of valid IEEE membership card. For each extra page, Indian authors will pay 1000 per page and foreign authors will pay 10 USD per page Note: Receipt of    registration will be provided during the conference. Payment of    Registration Fee : Participants can use only the wire transfer mode for    paying registration fee: Wire Transfer: Participants/authors    paying registration fees through Wire Transfer should use the following    information and email their bank transaction slip and relevant information  as per mentioned in Camera Ready Submissions webpage Kindly input transaction remark "PDGC-2026" Online Transfer WITHIN INDIA Name of the Bank Punjab National Bank Branch Name Shimla Complete Postal Address THE MALL, SHIMLA, H.P., INDIA Name of Beneficiary Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat Account No. of Beneficiary 0427002100682105 NEFT Code PUNB0042700 IFSC Code / RTGS Code PUNB0042700 MICR Code 171024002 TYPE OF ACCOUNT Current Wire Transfer from OUTSIDE INDIA (Only for FOREIGN AUTHORS) Name of Beneficiary Jaypee University of Information Technlogy Beneficiary Bank Punjab National Bank Beneficiary Bank A/C No. 0427032100000010 Receiving Bank Swift Code PUNBINBBPAR Bank Address: JUIT,Waknaghat Po.:-Waknaghat Tesh:-Kandaghat Distt.Solan State:-H.P. Pin Code:-173234 TECHNICAL SPONSOR To be updated.. FINANCIAL SPONSORS SUPPORTERS JUIT IEEE STUDENT BRANCH CONTACT US For information to all, that official email of PDGC-2026 is pdgc2026@juitsolan.in PDGC-2026, juit.ac.in
